subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the splendors of the Countenance and hath hearkened to the call of the Wronged One when He was in this mighty Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الوجه و سمع ندآء المظلوم اذ کان فی هذا السجن العظیم
